title: Ad Astra: Planets+ Add-ons
description: Official add-ons for Planets+! Includes mod compatibilities.
body:
# Planets+ Add-ons

**This is a hub** for our datapack, Planets+, which is developed by DeadbushCarrot.

## Ceres Add-on 
The Ceres Add-on is meant for older players who had stuff on the dwarf planet. This is to prevent progress loss and allow people to migrate their resources elsewhere.

## Mimas Add-on 
The Mimas add-on serves the same purpose as the Ceres add-on.

## Thermal Series Compat
This adds all of the Thermal Series ores to all celestial bodies in Planets+.

Thermal Series compat requires the following: 

- [Thermal and Space](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-and-space) 

- [Thermal Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion) (Duh)

## Mekanism Compat 
The Mekanism compat adds all of the Mekanism ores to all the celestial bodies, similarly to the Thermal Series compat.

Mekanism compat requires the following:

- [Mekanism: Ad Astra Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-ad-astra-ores)

- [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) (Duh)
  
## Thermal series and Mekanism Compat

This blends the Thermal and Mekanism compats together to prevent bugs between the two.

Thermal and Mekanism compat requires 

- [Thermal and Space](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-and-space)

- [Thermal Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion) 

- [Mekanism: Ad Astra Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-ad-astra-ores)

- [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)
